widgets_values: # in this node you can control the metadata synthesis, play around with it. by default generates image with datestamp in the last 7 days, adds random US city gps and random iso settings (scene_type). inject_color_profile is experimental as displays will then change how the colors of image are displayed based on this metadata hence its disabled by default

nodes.title: 💾 INSTARAW Synthesize & Save w/ Authentic Metadata

widgets_values:
# play with the values in the boxes 1., 2. and 3. to get a feel for it.

## In some scenes strengths as high as 1 worked good, in others 0.2-0.3 seems to almost be too much even

# don't really need to change the settings of 4. and 5.

# 5. can overcook the image, you can always bypass it

# in 7. change motion_blur_kernel to 2 in more dynamic scenes to add more good looking blur into image.
# vignette_strength to 0.5 for stylistic look

# chromatic_aberration to 0.5 for stylistic look

# iso_noise_scale to 1 + sensor_read_noise to 2 to add more noise

# bayer_demosaic for more blurry look (and perhaps lower chance of detection)

# 8. doesn't need to be touched
# 9. cooks the image a lot - use with caution. This can help with synthid if nothing else helps, crank up the steps and LR

# 3. switching this to per-channel seems to increase chance of bypassing a lot for some reason but I like the look of color-safe more as it doesn't cook the colors as much.. for max bypass switch this to per-channel :)
# here can play around with different iphone models, I personally like iphone_12s look a lot, looks very amateur imo

# 10. also cooks the image a lot, does multiple cycles of jpgfication, feel free to play around with it can make cycles anything like 1-4 cycles even, powerful stuff, u can adjust min- and max_quality as well to add randomness
# 6. can play around with these values
